niche: Indian stock market — NSE/BSE listed companies, fundamentals, sectors, IPOs and investing basics
audience: Indian retail investors researching listed companies, sectors and how the markets work
topicGuidance: Prefer practical investing topics: how to read a company's fundamentals, sector overviews, IPO explainers, index basics (Nifty/Sensex), and beginner investing guides. Avoid specific buy/sell tips or hallucinated prices.
